name: Marion Ryder (MOB)
text: Planning a wedding is hectic enough but, planning a surprise wedding for your daughter and future son-in-law (who live in England) to take place at Disney World is nothing short of amazing. Thank you for your support and beautiful ceremony. We could not have pulled it off without you.

name: Olympia & Philip Lee
text: From the moment we first spoke to you, we knew you were exactly the person we were looking for to marry us… you were charismatic, humorous and sincere. Our wedding ceremony was just as we had pictured it… romantic, emotional and memorable. Thank You… for making our “dream” come true!

name: Anthony & Susanne Pitzorella, Jr.
text: After speaking with you for the first time I felt very comfortable and it felt as if you were an old friend of the family. You told us not to worry about a thing and that you would take care of us. You most certainly did. Your kind words touched our hearts in a way that we will never forget. You personify the Disney standard of excellence. We will cherish your words forever.

name: Al & Amy Rix II
text: Others attending the wedding mentioned your words of wisdom and told us we made the right choice by having you as the focal point… we never doubted you, your leisure competence or your friendly smile… what a beautiful experience.
